label: Transparent Air Plant motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Air Plant transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a tillandsia air plant rosette, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: a single tillandsia rosette with slender curling leaves radiating from a compact center, silvery green trichome texture, pale sage undersides, a few subtle blush-violet leaf tips, and a tiny natural bark-brown root nub at the base only; accurate botanical form for an epiphytic air plant from a cloud forest branch.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural soft studio light that preserves leaf texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; no cropping; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: lightweight tool-system mood, airy and precise, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: silver green tillandsia leaves, pale sage, blush violet tips, muted bark brown base, cool cloud-forest neutrals only; do not use magenta in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no pot, no branch, no moss, no second plant, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible transparent Air Plant motif is the source reference for colors, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Air Plant".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: lightweight tool system for a precise cloud workspace, asset inspector, task queues, and compact operations; airy, calm, focused, low-friction, with 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: silver green tillandsia leaves, pale sage trichome highlights, blush violet leaf tips, muted bark brown base, cloud forest mist neutrals, soft lichen gray, charcoal bark ink. Include lightweight tool accents only by using motif greens and blush-violet, not generic blue or saturated purple.
Layout: polished product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small air plant motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "エアプランツ", "作業キュー", "状態", "検索".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, lightweight sidebar navigation, metric cards, tool status cards, queue table, soft line charts, inspector panels, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle fuzzy trichome grain, fine leaf-stripe dividers, bark-fiber hairline borders, misty cloud-forest surfaces, lightweight 8px card rhythm.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no dominant blue/purple theme, no watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible Air Plant motif and the visible Morphous Air Plant light design-system board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Air Plant" with the same lightweight tool-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: lightweight tool system for a precise cloud workspace, asset inspector, task queues, and compact operations; night-mode workspace, airy but focused, low-friction, with 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep bark-charcoal backgrounds, cool cloud-forest dark neutrals, silver-green text highlights, tillandsia sage primary controls, muted blush-violet secondary accents, bark-brown surfaces, lichen-gray borders. Avoid generic blue/purple dashboard colors and neon colors.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small air plant motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "エアプランツ", "作業キュー", "状態", "検索".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, lightweight sidebar navigation, metric cards, tool status cards, queue table, soft line charts, inspector panels, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark trichome grain, fine leaf-stripe dividers, bark-fiber hairline borders, misted cloud-forest panels, lightweight 8px card rhythm.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no unrelated colors, no pure-black flat background, no blue/purple gradients, no watermark.
